_human_review.notes: US Stage B generated/autolabeled labels were reconciled by Codex for internal benchmark cleanup; project-owner approval is still required before promotion-ready status.

_label_note: AUTO-LABELED by LLM. Spot-check before refreshing recall.lock.json. Lock updates must include this provenance in --reason per item 16.
_label_tier_note: US Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. ideal_must_detect is not a locked recall baseline. Pending labels still require project-owner approval before promotion-ready status.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: US Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.
_strict_reconciliation.strict_source: PreSendReviewEngine.review(..., review_profile='strict') after narrowed SA/US Stage B detector precision fixes

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: If we conclude the matter is material, we intend to issue a press release and furnish an Item 7.01 Form 8-K before market open pursuant to Nasdaq Listing Rule 5250(b)(1); otherwise, disclosure will be made in our next periodic report and on the upcoming earnings call.

Customer communications, if required under GLBA/FFIEC guidance, will be coordinated with Ophira PayWell, N.A., and any notifications will exclude test developer emails and avoid including personal identifiers beyond what is contractually required.
security monitoring detected unauthorized API calls
Do not discuss this incident with sell-side analysts, lenders, proxy advisors, or rating agencies absent a broad public communication
a materiality assessment under SEC Form 8-K Item 1.05 is in process
avoid including personal identifiers beyond what is contractually required
exposure of approximately 2,314 test token records
directors, Section 16 officers, and designated insiders
any trading by covered persons remains prohibited

must_detect.matched_text: If we conclude the matter is material, we intend to issue a press release and furnish an Item 7.01 Form 8-K before market open pursuant to Nasdaq Listing Rule 5250(b)(1); otherwise, disclosure will be made in our next periodic report and on the upcoming earnings call.

Customer communications, if required under GLBA/FFIEC guidance, will be coordinated with Ophira PayWell, N.A., and any notifications will exclude test developer emails and avoid including personal identifiers beyond what is contractually required.

must_not_detect.reason: Non-issuer operational update reference; exclude per negative target
Generic sensitive term without actual personal data
Generic phrase; not an actual identifier value

uncertain.reason: Implies controlled internal flow and barrier, but lacks explicit 'information barrier' terminology
Indicates embargo status before public release, but not using canonical embargo terms
Planned disclosure timing window; may be treated as an embargo/timing marker
Implies a maintained insider list, but phrase does not explicitly reference an insider list document
Internal ticket identifiers are potentially sensitive but not covered by current allowed rules
Token identifiers could be sensitive but are not mapped to an allowed rule type
Indicates presence of email-derived hashes; privacy-relevant but not an email address value
Partial token digits are sensitive contextually but not covered by an allowed PII rule
